title: Budget 2026 CPF Top-Up
text:
Budget 2026 CPF Top-Up - SupportGoWhere
Budget 2026 CPF Top-Up
Share link
Provides additional support to boost the retirement adequacy of eligible Singaporeans with CPF retirement savings below prevailing Basic Retirement Sum (BRS) through a CPF top-up in 2026.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can receive up to $1,500 in CPF top-up
No application needed - eligibility will be automatically assessed
Collapse all sections
About this support

$500 to $1,500 in CPF top-up for eligible Singaporean seniors, tiered by CPF retirement savings and Annual Value of the place of residence

Who is this for?

Eligibility criteria

Singapore Citizen

50 years old and above in 2026

CPF LIFE/Retirement Account or Ordinary/Special Account balances below prevailing BRS in 2026 of $110,200 as at 31 December 2025

Tiered by annual value of the place of residence (as indicated on NRIC), as at 31 December 2025

Does not own more than 1 property




How to apply?

No application needed – eligibility will be automatically assessed

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF hotline: 1800 222 2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.
Scheme last updated 27 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
